title: Master Bundle Pages
public_claim: A public atlas of the Master Bundle packets, showing which archives are live inputs, authority layers, handoffs, or reference materials.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts a large archive set into navigable project records with title, role, implementation state, source-use implications, and next action.
use_value: It prevents the 152-bundle corpus from becoming invisible; a reader can see what each packet is for without mistaking every archive for a finished live product.
